name: Spring Lamb and Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort and rinse the beans; soak overnight in cold water to cover (at least 5 cups), or bring to boil in water to cover, boil for 2 minutes, cover and let stand for 1 hour.
2. Drain and reserve 4 cups of the soaking liquid. Trim the lamb and cut into 3/4 inch cubes. In a large saucepan or kettle, heat oil and brown the lamb cubes on all sides over medium-high heat.
3. Meanwhile, cut root ends from leeks; slice lengthwise and rinse well under cold running water. Slice thinly. Mince garlic and add to lamb.
4. Peel, seed and chop tomatoes. Add with beans, broth, reserved bean liquid, marjoram and salt and pepper to taste. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat and simmer for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Cut cauliflower into small florets and slice zucchini. Add both to soup and cook for 10 minutes.
6. Wash and chop spinach; add to soup with parsley and cook for 3 to 5 minutes longer. Do not overcook since spinach will lose its color. If making ahead, add spinach and parsley just before serving after the soup has been reheated.
